title: Better Mace!
description: Replaces 2D Mace Model with a Custom 3D Mace Model. "Smashing in 3D!"
body:
# **Better Mace! - 3D Mace Model**
![Better Mace Logo v2 (pos fix)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf672bec7b2a571bec871d2e3d9c5a94482bae32.png)

- This resource pack replaces Minecraft’s default mace with a 3D model designed to better match its intended form.
- Compatible with Glowing Enchanted Tools! Put the Better Mace pack above it. (https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools)

- This pack aims to enhance the mace without altering gameplay, animations, or item behavior. It is purely a visual upgrade.

**Features**

- The 3D mace model
completey overhauls the visuals which gives the mace a more realistic and satisfying appearance.

- Emissive elements (shader compatible)
When using shaders, the mace’s rod emits a subtle glow for improved visual clarity and style.

# **How to Install?**
> 1. Click on "Download" and select your Game Version.
  ![Click on Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce756a92d610c1c06685df8d9bd85c8a7cd02af.png)
![Click on Select game version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d09f991d904ae855853b3593ef1101be172a1bc1.png)
> 2. Click yet again on "Download", and it should download.
![Click yet again on Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1f0c7741375ab3274e728a9e7c1bf54ecdfda50.png)
![Resource Pack downloaded (Brave Browser)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85ba907993f16e99ed95069c3b8a03fe1dac5e93.png)
> 3. After it's been downloaded, open Minecraft and go to Options
![Click on Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5da3b40c467df0002ff778eb9de65f206edc49c.jpeg)
Then, click on Resource Packs
![Click on Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71f6d969f3ccb08e08c74eecc1d4e810d9ae3401.jpeg)
And click on Open Pack Folder
![Click on Open Pack Folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df0c9832107046a9bfd5147392e099d258334c05.jpeg)
This windows should open, assuming you're on Windows 11, click on the + icon right next to the "resourcepacks" tab, then on the left side of the screen, click on Downloads.
After you're in downloads, drag and drop the "Better Mace.zip" file into the "resourcepacks" folder at the top left corner.
![Click on the + right next to the "resourcepacks" tab.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e870e9a76faad0045d92783b018de54abf735134.jpeg)
> 4. Once you've done that, close File Explorer and go into Minecraft and hover onto the Better Mace name, and click on the Arrow.
![Hover onto the Resource Pack and click on the arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c09d044a024e5bc97976125518215f36f8d6268b.jpeg)
> 5. Final step! Click on done, and enjoy your mace :)
![Click on Done! And you're good to go :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a303b91d2a971d93216cabbacd123c1ed8455216.jpeg)
